turns.content:
Here's your schedule for today, Jm — Thursday, Feb 12:

| Time | Event |
|------|-------|
| 6:30 | Morning Routine |
| 7:00 | Walk |
| 7:15 | Work Session - Focus |
| 8:00 | [OPTIONAL] Data + AI = DataAI |
| 8:45 | Salsa Practice |
| 9:00 | R&I Initiative Sync |
| 9:00 | Work Session - Flex |
| 10:30 | Rehab |
| 10:45 | Workout |
| 12:00 | Lunch |
| 12:30 | Decompress |
| 1:30 | Walk |
| 2:00 | Personal Tasks |
| 3:00 | Project Time |
| 4:30 | Evening Prep |
| 5:00 | Dinner |
| 9:30 | Evening Routine |

It's 7pm now, so you're past dinner — just the **Evening Routine at 9:30** left tonight.

🗣️ Kaya: Seventeen events today. Evening routine at nine-thirty is the only one remaining tonight.

params.command: pai-cli gcal today 2>/dev/null || pai-cli calendar today 2>/dev/null || echo "FALLBACK_NEEDED"
params.description: Get today's calendar events via pai-cli

tool_calls.name: Bash

params.command: which pai-cli 2>/dev/null && pai-cli --help 2>/dev/null | head -30 || echo "pai-cli not found in PATH"

tool_calls.result:
~/.claude/bin/pai-cli
\033[0;36mpai-cli\033[0m - Unified CLI wrapper for PAI Unix tools

\033[0;34mUsage:\033[0m
  pai-cli <service> [options]

\033[0;34mAvailable Services:\033[0m
  \033[0;32myoutube, yt\033[0m        YouTube video operations (via yt-dlp)
  \033[0;32mcalendar, gcal\033[0m     Google Calendar operations (via gcalcli)
  \033[0;32mdrive\033[0m              Google Drive operations (via rclone)
  \033[0;32mgmail\033[0m              Gmail operations (via gog)
  \033[0;32mgemini, ai\033[0m         Gemini AI operations (via gemini-cli)
  \033[0;32msheets\033[0m             Google Sheets operations
  \033[0;32mplaces\033[0m             Google Places discovery
  \033[0;32masana\033[0m              Asana task management (full CRUD)
  \033[0;32mplaywright, pw\033[0m     Browser automation (via Browse.ts)
  \033[0;32mbrowser\033[0m            Browser automation (alias for playwright)
  \033[0;32mbluesky, bsky\033[0m      Bluesky social operations (via bsky)
  \033[0;32mweather\033[0m            Weather information (via wttr.in)
  \033[0;32mlinear\033[0m             Linear issue tracking (via linearis)
  \033[0;32mslack\033[0m              Slack messaging (via slackcat)
  \033[0;32mgithub, gh\033[0m         GitHub operations (via gh)
  \033[0;32mgitlab\033[0m             GitLab operations (via glab)
  \033[0;32mop, secrets\033[0m        1Password operations (via op)
  \033[0;32mstripe\033[0m             Stripe operations (via stripe)
  \033[0;32msupabase\033[0m           Supabase operations (via supabase)
  \033[0;32mfirebase\033[0m           Firebase operations (via firebase)
  \033[0;32mnotebooklm, nlm\033[0m    NotebookLM operations (via MCP)
  \033[0;32mtasks, lt\033[0m          LucidTasks task management
  \033[0;32mtoon\033[0m               JSON <-> TOON format conversion
  \033[0;32mrepl, i\033[0m            Interactive REPL mode

tool_calls.name: Bash

params.description: Get today's calendar events with error output

tool_calls.error:
Exit code 2
usage: gcalcli [-h] [--version] [--client-id CLIENT_ID]
               [--client-secret CLIENT_SECRET] [--noauth_local_server]
               [--config-folder CONFIG_FOLDER] [--noincluderc]
               [--calendar GLOBAL_CALENDARS]
               [--default-calendar DEFAULT_CALENDARS] [--locale LOCALE]
               [--refresh] [--nocache] [--conky] [--nocolor]
               [--lineart {fancy,unicode,ascii}]
               {init,list,search,edit,delete,agenda,agendaupdate,updates,conflicts,calw,calm,quick,add,import,remind,config,util} ...
gcalcli: error: argument command: invalid choice: 'today' (choose from init, list, search, edit, delete, agenda, agendaupdate, updates, conflicts, calw, calm, quick, add, import, remind, config, util)

params.description: Get today's calendar agenda via gcalcli
